name: New York Biometric Collection Law
owner: New York State Department of Labor
description: New York State law restricting employer collection of biometric data. Codified at NY Labor Law §201-a. Prohibits employers from requiring fingerprinting except for specific exempted occupations. Companion to NYC Local Law 144 (automated employment decision tools) for the New York employment privacy landscape.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-based HR / time-and-attendance / access-control systems that collect employee biometrics in NY must comply with the §201-a restrictions.
relationToAISecurity: Biometric AI systems (face recognition for time tracking, fingerprint authentication) used by NY employers fall under §201-a scope.

license.notes: US state statutes are public-domain government works and may be freely redistributed.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source content acquisition + structured extraction is TODO.
